page_content:
MATH661 Complex Analysis II (3 Credits)

Introduction to techniques of several complex variables, with focus on geometric topics: Hartogs phenomena, Cousin problems, Dolbeault cohomology, L2 techniques, embedding of Stein manifolds, and the theory of coherent analytic sheaves.

Prerequisite: MATH630 and MATH660.

MATH669 Selected Topics in Riemann Surfaces (1-3 Credits) Construction of Riemann surfaces, hyperbolic geometry, Fuchsian and Kleinian groups, potential theory, uniformisation spaces of meromorphic functions, line bundles, Picard variety, Riemann-Roch, Teichmueller theory.
